title: A Snake Was Hiding Behind This Family's TV
script: Nobody checked behind the TV! A Queensland, Australia family had a house guest they didn't know about — a large carpet python, coiled behind their living room TV mount. They'd left the doors and windows open, and apparently the snake saw an opportunity. When they finally found it, they called Stuart McKenzie of Sunshine Coast Snake Catchers 24/7. McKenzie arrived with a hook, reached behind the mount, and pulled the python out — calm, professional, utterly unbothered. The homeowner explained that the snake must have slipped in through an open door or window while they were airing out the place. Which is one way to describe almost sharing a couch with a python for who knows how long. The snake was released safely outdoors. How long had that snake been back there?
